0.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "pipeline" 
| filter event.type=="run" 
| filter event.status == "finished" 
| filter event.provider=="github.com" 
| filter in(vcs.repository.ref.name, $Repository) 
| filter in(cicd.pipeline.name, $Workflow) 
| filter in(ext.pipeline.run.trigger, $Trigger)
| summarize count(), by: { cicd.pipeline.run.outcome}
0.title: Workflow Completion Status

1.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "pipeline" 
| filter event.type=="run" 
| filter event.status == "finished" 
| filter event.provider=="github.com" 
| fields vcs.repository.ref.name, cicd.pipeline.name, ext.pipeline.run.trigger
| filter in(vcs.repository.ref.name, $Repository) 
| filter in(cicd.pipeline.name, $Workflow) 
| filter in(ext.pipeline.run.trigger, $Trigger)
| summarize count()
1.title: Total Workflow Executions

10.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "pipeline" 
| filter event.type=="run" 
| filter event.status == "finished" 
| filter event.provider=="github.com" 
| fields vcs.repository.ref.name, cicd.pipeline.name, ext.pipeline.run.trigger, duration
| filter in(vcs.repository.ref.name, $Repository) 
| filter in(cicd.pipeline.name, $Workflow) 
| filter in(ext.pipeline.run.trigger, $Trigger)
| summarize median(duration)
10.title: Median Execution Time

11.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "pipeline" 
| filter event.type=="run" 
| filter event.status == "finished" 
| filter event.provider=="github.com" 
| filter in(vcs.repository.ref.name, $Repository) 
| filter in(cicd.pipeline.name, $Workflow) 
| filter in(ext.pipeline.run.trigger, $Trigger)
| summarize count(), by: { ext.pipeline.run.trigger}
11.title: Pipeline triggers

12.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "pipeline" 
| filter event.type=="run" 
| filter event.status == "finished" 
| filter event.provider=="github.com" 
| filter ext.pipeline.run.attempt > 1 
| fields vcs.repository.ref.name, cicd.pipeline.name, ext.pipeline.run.trigger
| filter in(vcs.repository.ref.name,$Repository) 
| filter in(cicd.pipeline.name,$Workflow) 
| filter in(ext.pipeline.run.trigger,$Trigger)
| summarize count()
12.title: Re-triggered Workflows

14.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "task"  
| filter event.type=="build" 
| filter event.status == "finished" 
| filter event.provider=="github.com" 
| fieldsAdd steps_array=toArray(ext.task.steps) 
| expand steps_array 
| parse steps_array,"JSON:steps_data" 
| join [
  fetch events 
  | filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
  | filter  event.category == "pipeline"  
  | filter event.type=="run" 
  | filter event.status == "finished" 
  | fields cicd.pipeline.run.id, cicd.pipeline.name, vcs.repository.ref.name, ext.pipeline.run.trigger 
  | filter  in(vcs.repository.ref.name, $Repository) 
  | filter in(cicd.pipeline.name,$Workflow) 
  | filter in(ext.pipeline.run.trigger,$Trigger) ], 
  on:{cicd.pipeline.run.id}, prefix: "workflow." 
| fieldsAdd step.duration = toTimestamp(steps_data[completed_at]) - toTimestamp(steps_data[started_at]), 
step.name = steps_data[name], 
step.conclusion = steps_data[conclusion], 
step.status = steps_data[status], 
step.task.id = task.id,
step.task.name = task.name,
step.task.outcome = task.outcome,
step.task.cicd.pipeline.run.id = cicd.pipeline.run.id 
| summarize failureRate=if(count() == 0, 0, else: toDouble(countIf(step.conclusion=="failure")) / toDouble(count())*100), by: {step.name, step.task.name} 
| filter failureRate > 0 
| sort  failureRate desc 
| limit 5
14.title: Error-prone Steps | Top 5

15.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "task" 
| filter event.type=="build"
| filter event.status == "finished" 
| filter event.provider=="github.com" 
| join [
  fetch events 
  | filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
  | filter event.category == "pipeline"
  | filter event.type=="run" 
  | filter event.status == "finished" 
  | fields cicd.pipeline.run.id, cicd.pipeline.name, vcs.repository.ref.name, ext.pipeline.run.trigger 
  | filter  in(vcs.repository.ref.name, $Repository) 
  | filter in(cicd.pipeline.name, $Workflow) 
  | filter in(ext.pipeline.run.trigger, $Trigger) ], 
  on:{cicd.pipeline.run.id}, prefix: "workflow." 
| fieldsAdd steps_array=toArray(ext.task.steps) 
| expand steps_array 
| parse steps_array,"JSON:steps_data" 
| fieldsAdd step.duration = toTimestamp(steps_data[completed_at]) - toTimestamp(steps_data[started_at]), 
step.name = steps_data[name], 
step.conclusion = steps_data[conclusion], 
step.status = steps_data[status], 
step.task.id = task.id,
step.task.name = task.name,
step.task.outcome = task.outcome,
step.task.cicd.pipeline.run.id = cicd.pipeline.run.id 
| summarize percentile(step.duration,50), alias:Median ,by:{step.name, alias: StepName,step.task.name, alias: TaskName} 
| filter isNotNull(Median) 
| sort Median desc 
| limit 5
15.title: Step Duration (p50) | Top 5

17.content:
### Step Details

These tiles will give you a comprehensive view of the detailed performance and status of individual steps within your GitHub jobs

-----

18.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT"
| filter event.category == "task"
| filter event.type=="build"
| filter event.status == "finished"
| filter event.provider=="github.com"
| join [
  fetch events 
  | filter event.category == "pipeline"  
  | filter event.status == "finished" 
  | filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
  | filter event.type=="run" 
  | fields cicd.pipeline.run.id,cicd.pipeline.name, vcs.repository.ref.name, ext.pipeline.run.trigger 
  | filter in(vcs.repository.ref.name, $Repository) 
  | filter in(cicd.pipeline.name, $Workflow) 
  | filter in(ext.pipeline.run.trigger, $Trigger) ], 
  on:{cicd.pipeline.run.id}, prefix: "workflow." 
| summarize Count=count() , by:{ext.task.runner.name} 
| sort Count desc 
| limit 5
18.title: Job Runners | Top 5

19.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "pipeline"  
| filter event.type=="run" 
| filter event.status == "started" 
| filter in(vcs.repository.ref.name, $Repository) 
| filter in(cicd.pipeline.name, $Workflow) 
| filter in(ext.pipeline.run.trigger, $Trigger)  
| fields start_time, cicd.pipeline.run.id, ext.pipeline.run.attempt
| joinNested jobs=[
  fetch events 
  | filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
  | filter event.category == "task" 
  | filter event.type=="build" 
  | filter event.status == "started" 
  | filter event.provider=="github.com" 
  | fields cicd.pipeline.run.id,ext.task.run.attempt,start_time 
  | sort start_time asc ],
  on: {cicd.pipeline.run.id,left[ext.pipeline.run.attempt]==right[ext.task.run.attempt]} 
| fieldsAdd timeToStart = jobs[0][start_time] - start_time
19.title: First pipeline job time-to-start

2.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "pipeline" 
| filter event.type=="run" 
| filter event.status == "finished" 
| filter event.provider=="github.com" 
| fields vcs.repository.ref.name, cicd.pipeline.name, ext.pipeline.run.trigger, duration
| filter in(vcs.repository.ref.name, $Repository) 
| filter in(cicd.pipeline.name, $Workflow) 
| filter in(ext.pipeline.run.trigger, $Trigger)
| summarize avg(duration)
2.title: Average Execution Time

20.content:
### GitHub Workflow Pulse: Execution Stats

This dashboard offers a detailed overview of your GitHub workflow executions, providing valuable insights into the performance and efficiency of your CI/CD pipelines. [Data ingest](https://dt-rnd.atlassian.net/wiki/x/WwLNLg)

24.content:
### Workflow Details

This section provides a clear and detailed view of the current state of GitHub workflow executions, enabling you to manage and improve them effectively. 

-----

25.content:
### Job Details

This section will give you a comprehensive view of the detailed performance and status of individual jobs within your GitHub workflows, enabling you to monitor, analyze, and optimize your CI/CD processes effectively. 

-----

3.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT"
| filter event.category == "task"  
| filter event.type=="build"
| filter event.status == "finished" 
| filter event.provider =="github.com" 
| filter task.outcome != "skipped" 
| join [
  fetch events 
  | filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
  | filter  event.category == "pipeline"
  | filter event.type=="run" 
  | filter event.status == "finished" 
  | fields cicd.pipeline.run.id,cicd.pipeline.name,vcs.repository.ref.name, ext.pipeline.run.trigger 
  | filter in(vcs.repository.ref.name, $Repository) 
  | filter in(cicd.pipeline.name, $Workflow) 
  | filter in(ext.pipeline.run.trigger, $Trigger) ], 
  on:{cicd.pipeline.run.id}, prefix: "workflow." 
| summarize percentile(duration,50), alias:Median ,by:{task.name, alias: TaskName} 
| filter isNotNull(Median)  
| sort Median desc 
| limit 5
3.title: Job Duration (p50) | Top 5

30.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "task" 
| filter event.status == "finished" 
| filter event.provider=="github.com" 
| fields vcs.repository.ref.name, cicd.pipeline.name, ext.pipeline.run.trigger, duration
| filter in(vcs.repository.ref.name, $Repository) 
| summarize avg(duration)
30.title: Average Job Duration

4.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "pipeline" 
| filter event.type=="run" 
| filter event.status == "finished" 
| filter event.provider=="github.com" 
| fields vcs.repository.ref.name, cicd.pipeline.name, ext.pipeline.run.trigger, cicd.pipeline.run.outcome
| filter in(vcs.repository.ref.name,$Repository) 
| filter in(cicd.pipeline.name,$Workflow)
| filter in(ext.pipeline.run.trigger,$Trigger)
| summarize failureRate=if(count() == 0, 0, else: toDouble(countIf(cicd.pipeline.run.outcome=="failure")) / toDouble(count())*100)
4.title: Error Rate

5.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "pipeline" 
| filter event.type=="run" 
| filter event.status == "finished" 
| filter event.provider=="github.com" 
| filter cicd.pipeline.run.outcome != "canceled" 
| filter in(vcs.repository.ref.name, $Repository) 
| filter in(cicd.pipeline.name, $Workflow) 
| filter in(ext.pipeline.run.trigger, $Trigger)
| summarize percentile(duration,50), alias:Median ,by:{cicd.pipeline.name, alias: name} | sort Median desc | limit 5
5.title: Workflow Duration (p50) | Top 5

6.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "pipeline" 
| filter event.type=="run" 
| filter event.status == "finished" 
| filter event.provider=="github.com" 
| filter in(vcs.repository.ref.name, $Repository) 
| filter in(cicd.pipeline.name, $Workflow) 
| filter in(ext.pipeline.run.trigger, $Trigger)
| summarize failureRate = if(count() == 0, 0, else: toDouble(countIf(cicd.pipeline.run.outcome=="failure")) / toDouble(count())*100), by: {vcs.repository.ref.name,cicd.pipeline.name }
| filter failureRate>0 | sort  failureRate desc | limit 5
6.title: Error-prune Workflows | Top 5

7.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "task"  
| filter event.type =="build"
| filter event.status == "finished" 
| filter event.provider=="github.com" 
| join [
  fetch events 
  | filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
  | filter event.category == "pipeline"  
  | filter event.type=="run" 
  | filter event.status == "finished" 
  | fields cicd.pipeline.run.id,cicd.pipeline.name,vcs.repository.ref.name, ext.pipeline.run.trigger 
  | filter  in(vcs.repository.ref.name, $Repository) 
  | filter in(cicd.pipeline.name, $Workflow) 
  | filter in(ext.pipeline.run.trigger, $Trigger) ], 
  on:{cicd.pipeline.run.id}, prefix: "workflow." 
| summarize failureRate=if(count() == 0, 0, else: toDouble(countIf(task.outcome=="failure")) / toDouble(count())*100), by: task.name 
| filter failureRate>0 
| sort  failureRate desc 
| limit 5
7.title: Error-prone Jobs | Top 5

8.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "pipeline" 
| filter event.type=="run" 
| filter event.status == "finished" 
| filter event.provider=="github.com" 
| filter in(vcs.repository.ref.name, $Repository) 
| filter in(cicd.pipeline.name, $Workflow) 
| filter in(ext.pipeline.run.trigger, $Trigger)
| fields 
Duration = duration,
Name = cicd.pipeline.name,
Status = cicd.pipeline.run.outcome,
Run = cicd.pipeline.run.url.full,
Attempts = ext.pipeline.run.attempt,
Trigger = ext.pipeline.run.trigger,
Start = start_time,
End = end_time,
Repository = vcs.repository.ref.name 
| sort Duration desc
8.title: Workflow Execution Details

variables.input:
fetch events
| filter event.category == "pipeline" and event.status == "finished" and event.provider=="github.com" and event.type == "run"
| summarize distinctRepositories = collectDistinct(vcs.repository.ref.name)
| expand distinctRepositories
| sort distinctRepositories

fetch events
| filter event.category == "pipeline" and event.status == "finished" and event.provider=="github.com" and event.type == "run"
| filter in(vcs.repository.ref.name, $Repository)
| summarize distinctWorkflows = collectDistinct(cicd.pipeline.name)
| expand distinctWorkflows
| sort distinctWorkflows

fetch events
| filter event.category == "pipeline" and event.status == "finished" and event.provider=="github.com" and event.type == "run"
| summarize distinctTriggers = collectDistinct(ext.pipeline.run.trigger)
| expand distinctTriggers
| sort distinctTriggers
